name: Spiced Tea
directions: Combine all ingredients.
Store in airtight jar.
Use 1 teaspoon of spiced tea per cup.

name: Autumn Holiday Tea
directions: Mix ingredients well and store in air tight container.
Boil milk for mug of tea.
Add 1 plain tea bag per mug,pour hot milk over teabag in mug, (donot add water) sprinkle a pinch or two of dry mixture into hot milk and teabag.
Stir.
Leave teabag in mug.
If you really like this, you can always make more of the dry ingredients, just make sure its in equal amounts.
You can always add a little extra sugar in tea if you like it sweeter.

name: Friendship Tea
directions: Mix all ingredients in a large bowl.
Pour contents into clean, dry glass jars and label the jars.
For one serving, mix 2 teaspoons into 1 cup of boiling water.

name: Instant Spiced Tea
directions: Mix all ingredients together.
Put it in an air-tight container.
TO SERVE:  Place 2 teaspoons mix to 1 cup boiling water or whatever strength you like.

name: Hill's Russian Tea Mix
directions: Mix all together and keep in airtight container. Add as much as you desire to water.

name: Real Chai Tea Concentrate
directions: Mix the spices and condensed milk thoroughly.  Refrigerate at least 24 hours.  Brew a strong blank tea (Assams are good) or Rooibos for an herbal chai.  Stir in 1/2 to 2 heaping teaspoons of chai concentrate per cup of freshly brewed tea.

name: Stepmonster Russian Tea
directions: Combine all ingredients in a 1gal ziploc bag; shake well.
Combine 2 heaping spoonfulls to your coffee mug of boiling water.

name: Orange Cinnamon Tea Blend
directions: Mix all ingredients together.
Put in your tin or jar and label with instructions if giving as a gift.
Use 1 teaspoon per cup of boiling water and steep 4 to 5 minutes.
Garnish with orange peel.

name: Apple Spice Tea
directions: Assemble all the ingredients and place in a tea ball.  Note: If you don't own a tea ball, then you can put the ingredients directly in the water and then strain out later.
Place tea ball in hot water and steep for 10 minutes.

name: Orange Spice Tea
directions: Assemble all the ingredients and place in a tea ball.  Note: If you don't own a tea ball, then you can put the ingredients directly in the water and then strain out later.
Place tea ball in hot water and steep for 10 minutes.

name: Mint Cinnamon Tea
directions: Assemble all the ingredients and place in a tea ball.  Note: If you don't own a tea ball, then you can put the ingredients directly in the water and then strain out later.
Place tea ball in hot water and steep for 10 minutes.

name: Chai Tea Mix
directions: Mix all ingredients together in a container. Store tightly closed.
To make chai tea, steep 1 black tea bag in 1 cup boiling water for 3-5 minutes. Stir in 2 tablespoons of chai tea mix.
